message:
fix(workers): add robust error handling for stats command

- Add fallback defaults when registry/governor stats unavailable
- Fix null reference errors when database not initialized
- Handle missing SQLite gracefully with sensible defaults
- Add null coalescing throughout displayStats

Published: agentic-flow@2.0.1-alpha.80

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
